product: L2 + L2D (L-Acoustics L Series progressive curvature WST line source system)

electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 45 - 20000 (usable bandwidth, -10 dB); extends to 25 Hz when paired with KS28 subwoofers
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 155 dB peak for a full L2 enclosure and 151 dB for a full L2D (preset [L2 70]/[L2D 70], 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4). A single top module alone reaches about 147 dB.
electroacoustic.impedance_note: 8 ohms per section (LC / LF / HF each 8 ohms); the enclosure presents 16 amplifier-driven channels
electroacoustic.directivity: Vertical 10 degrees fixed per L2 element (progressive curvature, no inter-element angles); L2D adds a downfill section giving 60 degrees total. Horizontal is set per Panflex module to 70 degrees symmetric, 110 degrees symmetric, or 90 degrees asymmetric (35/55 or 55/35); the L2D lower two modules are fixed progressive 110-140 degrees. Selectable cardioid or supercardioid LF polar pattern.
electroacoustic.components: 4 x 12-inch LC (low-frequency cardioid, side-mounted) neodymium cone, 8 x 10-inch LF neodymium cone, and 8 x 3-inch HF neodymium-diaphragm compression drivers on DOSC waveguides. LC/LF loaded bass-reflex with L-Vents; HF via DOSC waveguide with Panflex/L-Fins.

amplification.preset_note: Base presets set horizontal directivity (70/90/110); the _S suffix selects supercardioid LF instead of the default cardioid. KS28 L2xxx presets couple subwoofers (_C / _Cx variants for cardioid sub configurations). Soundvision Autofilter is strongly recommended to generate per-element electronic settings.

connection.input_connector: 1 x 37-point male connector (32 points used), carrying all 16 amplifier channels
connection.cabling: SC32 (37-point F to 37-point M, 32 points, touring) and SC32 BE (37-point F to bare-end, install) loudspeaker cables; SC32P 0.3 m extension adaptor. One LA-RAK III touring rack (3x LA7.16 + LA-POWER II + LA-PANEL III + 2x LS10) drives up to four L2/L2D elements.

physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic beech and birch plywood; coated steel grille with acoustically neutral 3D fabric; high-grade steel rigging with anti-corrosion coating. Finish dark grey-brown Pantone 426 C (also pure white RAL 9010, custom on order).

modes: flown (J-shaped line source via captive rigging)
deployment.max_per_flown_array: Up to 4 L2, or 3 L2 + 1 L2D, per flown array (safe limit with L2-BUMP)
deployment.inter_element_angles: None - progressive mechanical curvature locks elements at fixed angles automatically; the captive 4-point rigging eliminates manual inter-element splay
deployment.array_note: L2 and L2D share the same captive rigging and intermix in one array. L2D provides the array downfill. With LA-RAKMOUNT + 2x L2-BAR an LA-RAK III can be flown atop the array (4 L2 + 1 rack, or 3 L2 + 1 L2D + 1 rack).
rigging_accessories: K2-JACK (tilt screw jacks for ground stacking)

usage: Long-throw main PA element for medium-to-large touring and installed systems, where its fixed-curvature design lets an array be built without measuring or setting any inter-element angles, speeding rig and de-rig.

Each L2 or L2D requires its own dedicated LA7.16/LA7.16i (16 channels, one amp per box); plan amp inventory at a strict 1:1 box-to-amplifier ratio, with an LA-RAK III housing three amps for up to four elements.

Pair with KS28 subwoofers (driven by LA12X/LA2Xi) for full sub-low extension to 25 Hz; use the KS28 L2 presets and place subs behind the hang (preferred) or beside it, and reverse one box per group of four for a cardioid sub array.

Exploit the side-firing 12-inch LC drivers for broadband cardioid or supercardioid low-frequency control - keep the same LF polar pattern (cardioid vs the _S supercardioid presets) across the whole system.
Tune horizontal coverage per Panflex module (70/90/110 degrees) to shape audience coverage; note the L2D's lower section is a fixed progressive 110-140 degree downfill on the 110 electronic setting.

Always model in Soundvision before flying - mechanical safety, array limits (up to 4 elements), and per-element electronic settings cannot be determined by hand; use Autofilter then load via LA Network Manager.
